description_long: This house features a modern, cubic architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one slightly taller than the other, connected by a shared platform. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and visual interest. The front entryway is defined by a set of steps leading to a recessed door, partially sheltered by the overhanging upper story. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color palette, with subtle variations in tone between the two main volumes. Minimalist balconies and terraces are integrated into the design, enhancing outdoor living space and architectural depth.
description: A modern, cubic house with flat roofs, large asymmetrical windows, and minimalist balconies. The exterior features light tones and a recessed entryway with steps.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angled perspective, highlighting the two main cubic volumes, large windows, and a balcony on the right.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade, emphasizing the entry steps, recessed doorway, and a prominent window above the entrance.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the house, revealing the connection between the two main volumes, additional windows, and a terrace.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the rear of the house, with a focus on the back windows and the more enclosed, private side of the structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, minimal overhang, and a simple modern door
